allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add project design documentation and development guidelines

- DESIGN.md: Full architecture, tech stack, data flow, and API specs
- CLAUDE.md: Development guidelines, engineering principles, and conventions
- PROGRESS.md: Implementation task tracker organized by phase

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Phase 1: Project setup complete

- Create directory structure (app/api, app/services, app/core, tests)
- Add requirements.txt with FastAPI, faster-whisper, pywebview
- Add requirements-dev.txt with pytest, ruff, mypy, pyinstaller
- Setup Python packages with __init__.py files
- Update PROGRESS.md with completed tasks

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
